name: Your RP world
description:
And if you had the chance to create your own world? Make your own rules, laws, create peoples, animals, stories, your own choices?

Well, this is possible here.

You get the most cool power ever...The power to create universes with different stories, characters, consequences and rules! You can also insert yourself into the story if you want!!

TW: Sensitive content in the bot message examples! Suicide attempt, absent family, war. If you’re not comfortable with these topics, don't read them. Stay safe! Remember you're important!

Notes: Please, make stories where you feel safe and comfortable. Also, my unhappiness is not being able to use the alignment justify anymore...😔

If the bot speaks for you, describes your emotions and actions or even gets repetitive is not my responsibility, it's yours LLM. You can fix it via the LLM prompt/Jailbreak!

I put guidelines in my bots to be not repetitive, or speak for the user, but unfortunately this can still happen.

So don't be rude and don't comment about it in your review, thank you!

You can find out what Jailbreak/LMM is and examples by clicking on these link here: What is LMM/Jailbreak? (Coming soon)

Personal tip to prevent the bot from speaking or acting for you?

Yes, this: Delete what the bot has written as your action, speech or feeling. This will make the bot understand and possibly not continue with this pattern in future messages. You can also add your message: {{char}} don't will interpret, describe, or act for {{user}}.

Want to order a bot? You can request
creator: roditespace
